concerns.text: FR-001 requires outputting a labeled dataset with exactly one structural feature per case. Task T011b is marked [ ] (incomplete) and T012 is marked [ ] (incomplete). While T011b describes the artifact generation, the lack of a completed task or explicit 'Done' status for the core annotation pipeline (T011b/T012) means the FR-001 requirement is not currently covered by an executable task in the plan.

FR-002 requires a rule set covering ≥90% of patterns. Task T013 describes the distillation logic and retry attempts, but T014 (Coverage Measurement) is marked [X] (implemented) while T013 is marked [X]. However, T011c (Data Splitting) is marked [ ] (incomplete). Since T013 depends on T011c, the coverage measurement (T014) cannot be executed, leaving the FR-002 validation loop unimplemented.

FR-004 mandates a stratified random sample of 100 tasks. Task T019a generates the manifest but does not explicitly enforce the count of 100 or the stratification logic in its description. Task T023 (stratification logic) is marked [ ] (incomplete). Without T023 or explicit logic in T019a, the FR-004 requirement for a specific stratified sample size is not covered.

FR-005 requires recording metrics stratified by failure type. Task T020 records metrics but does not explicitly mention stratification in its description. Task T023 (stratification logic) is marked [ ] (incomplete). The specific requirement to record metrics *stratified* by failure type is not covered by a completed task.

Constitution Principle III (Data Hygiene) and Plan.md require schema validation for all derived data. Tasks T004a, T004b, T004c (schema creation) are marked [ ] (incomplete). Tasks T012, T015b, T024b (validation logic) are marked [ ] (incomplete). The requirement to validate outputs against schemas before writing is not covered by any completed task.

SC-003 requires determining statistical significance (p < 0.05) and outputting a narrative conclusion. Task T026b is marked [ ] (incomplete). While T025 (model fitting) is [X], the specific logic to determine significance and generate the narrative conclusion (SC-003) is not covered by a completed task.

SC-004 requires measuring the proportion of 'Coverage Gap' vs 'Distillation Error'. Task T027 (categorization logic) is marked [X], but T028 (ground truth arbitration) is marked [ ] (incomplete). T027b (execution) is marked [X] but depends on T028. The full measurement of SC-004 relies on incomplete tasks.

Task T015a is tagged [US1] and marked [ ] (incomplete), but it duplicates the schema creation for `distilled_rule.schema.yaml` which was already defined in T004b (Phase 2). This is a stale/duplicate task definition that should be removed or merged to avoid confusion, as T004b already covers the schema creation requirement.

Task T024a is tagged [US2] and marked [ ] (incomplete), but it duplicates the schema creation for `pivot_attempt.schema.yaml` which was already defined in T004c (Phase 2). This is a stale/duplicate task definition that should be removed or merged.
